use_case: 18 business case study simulations for Lo! Foods brand strategy research across sub-brands, channels, pricing, and consumer segments in Indian health food market.
notes: Real brand name used throughout. Interventions emerge dynamically from probing phase — not pre-set. All personas are India-grounded with Sarvam cultural layer enabled. B2B professional personas (P1-P4) run full 8-phase simulation including personal health beliefs.

target_segments.name: Cafeteria / Institutional Food Operator
target_segments.role: food procurement and operations decision-maker for institutional cafeterias
target_segments.notes: Margin-sensitive. Evaluates on: bulk pricing, shelf life, consistent supply, ease of preparation/serving. Health claims are secondary to operational viability. Needs bulk format (not retail packs). Lo! Foods must solve the operational case before the health case for this buyer.
